title: senecio kryophilus
intro: Senecio kryophilus, also known as the frost senecio, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio kryophilus include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Senecio kryophilus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
